vitest-worker-1
tracks enrichment failures in reconciliation — a dropped report is a breach, not a log line
404s an unknown TRN
NACKs an invalid execution but STILL stores it — completeness over prettiness
suppresses a duplicate TRN: same trade reported twice → one report (200 duplicate)
a reporting outage NEVER fails the trade — trading halts are worse than late reports
computes notional as integer minor units
a duplicate TRN never creates a second EMIR pair
executes a valid trade: prices it, validates, books the position
reports the execution with the EXECUTED price, quantity, and side
rejected trades are NEVER reported — only executions are reportable
rejects zero or negative quantity
lists reports by account for reconciliation tooling
notional breach discovered at the REAL boundary → 422, portfolio untouched
malformed upstream response body → 503, never books against garbage data
does not book a position when pre-trade validation rejects
POST /executions submits an execution and returns the submission receipt
creates a MATCHED EMIR pair alongside the MiFID report
verifies all interactions
reconciliation carries the EMIR pairing counters
reporting stays disabled when no client is configured
verifies all interactions
happy path: prices, validates, books → 201 EXECUTED
rejects non-integer amounts — money is never a float

FAILS CLOSED: market data unavailable → 503 and portfolio is NEVER called
unknown symbol maps to 422, not a 500
slow market-data (beyond client timeout) → 503, FAILS CLOSED, no booking
rejects a malformed submission outright (schema, not domain)
ACKs a clean execution: 201 ACCEPTED with zero violations

an executed BUY produces exactly one ACCEPTED report carrying the executed economics
